title: Grilled Pork Thit Nuong
description: A keto friendly Vietnamese-inspired dish featuring grilled pork, served with a side of garlicky bun.
instructions: 2. In a small bowl, mix together hind, shank, and garlic.
3. Rub the mixture all over the thit nuong.
4. Grill the thit nuong for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
5. Meanwhile, toast the garlicky bun on the grill.
6. Slice the grilled thit nuong and serve with the toasted bun.
7. Drizzle with fish sauce and sprinkle with black pepper to taste.
